一分大发大小单双推荐【网：59FC·CC】【网：95FC·CC】【QQ：5075273】【网：35FC·CC】<浏览器手动输入网址>【首单返利50%】【来富彩，马上发】【富彩祝您】【鸿运当头好运来】【财源滚滚为您开】【精彩纷呈乐不停】【大奖小奖进家门】JINYUAN666《金源导师》<br>原文翻译及赏析_作者李白<br>青天有月来几时？我今停杯一问之。<br>人攀明月不可得，月行却与人相随。<br>皎如飞镜临丹阙，绿烟灭尽清辉发。<br>但见宵从海上来，宁知晓向云间没。<br>白兔捣药秋复春，嫦娥孤栖与谁邻？<br>今人不见古时月，今月曾经照古人。<br>古人今人若流水，共看明月皆如此。<br>唯愿当歌对酒时，月光长照金樽里。<br>[![66.jpg](https://i.postimg.cc/SsTM0tXD/66.jpg)](https://postimg.cc/hzmjTs1d)<br>[![67.jpg](https://i.postimg.cc/C1kx7PGg/67.jpg)](https://postimg.cc/CBM0L4rP)<br>[![68.jpg](https://i.postimg.cc/NM6QmycS/68.jpg)](https://postimg.cc/r0p6LwzN)<br>[![82.jpg](https://i.postimg.cc/4NNXHNSg/82.jpg)](https://postimg.cc/z3Ms95Nt)<br>[![83.jpg](https://i.postimg.cc/DwRhNQy8/83.jpg)](https://postimg.cc/K17CkMT2)<br>[![84.jpg](https://i.postimg.cc/1XWhrwj1/84.jpg)](https://postimg.cc/dZTxqkF5)<br>------------------<br>vk.com/topic-239218398_65014826<br>vk.com/topic-239149194_64503665<br>vk.com/topic-239149370_65567305<br>vk.com/topic-239149277_65945378<br>vk.com/topic-239171060_65567304<br>vk.com/topic-239142182_65110209<br>vk.com/topic-239183257_65945374<br>vk.com/topic-239136408_65014832<br>vk.com/topic-239149346_64824623<br>vk.com/topic-239218348_65014830<br>vk.com/topic-239218546_64824626<br>vk.com/topic-239153805_64417755<br>vk.com/topic-239183285_64417756<br>vk.com/topic-239202992_65110215<br>vk.com/topic-239183296_64824634<br>vk.com/topic-239149249_65292227<br>vk.com/topic-239183265_64417761<br>vk.com/topic-239149248_65014834<br>vk.com/topic-239142208_65014835<br>vk.com/topic-239153619_65292230<br>vk.com/topic-239149317_65945394<br>vk.com/topic-239136431_66163003<br>vk.com/topic-239218445_64417763<br>vk.com/topic-239183421_66163007<br>vk.com/topic-239183330_65567322<br>vk.com/topic-239212682_65110222<br>vk.com/topic-239183467_65945398<br>vk.com/topic-239218482_65110227<br>vk.com/topic-239218534_64503683<br>vk.com/topic-239149141_66163009<br>vk.com/topic-239170359_65292234<br>vk.com/topic-239149277_65945400<br>vk.com/topic-239183257_65945403<br>vk.com/to
